_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: Using the GEO database, NF1 knockdown and knockout assays were selected: GSE14038 and GSE115406. The log fold-change (logFC) and false discovery rate (FDR) values for the ten potential modifier genes in each dataset are presented
details: Provided NF1 knockdown and knockout datasets (GSE14038 and GSE115406) for differential gene expression analysis of candidate modifier genes
